# robots.txt for orlop (https://orlop.dev)
# Format follows RFC 9309 (https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9309).
# This is a public documentation + marketing site: crawling is welcome.

# Default rules for every crawler and agent.
User-agent: *
Allow: /
# Agent-facing artifacts — explicitly allowed so LLMs/agents can fetch them.
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt
# Build/internal artifacts that carry no useful content for crawlers.
Disallow: /_astro/
Disallow: /404
Disallow: /*.json$

# Sitemap (auto-generated by Astro because `site` is set in astro.config.mjs).
Sitemap: https://orlop.dev/sitemap-index.xml
